mapper.select: /* InsrOrderMapper.getInsrCmpnListByInsrMngmNo */ SELECT FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0253', A.IF_CD) AS cmpnTypeNm , A.INSR_MNGM_NO AS insrMngmNo , A.ACDNT_NO AS acdntNo , A.ACDNT_REG_DT AS acdntRegDt , A.ACDNT_DT AS acdntDt , A.CMPN_CNFM_DT AS cmpnCnfmDt , A.RMN_CMPN_AMT AS rmnCmpnAmt --잔여보상금액 , A.CMPN_ACML_AMT AS cmpnAcmlAmt --보상누적금액 , A.RMN_CMPN_LMT_AMT AS rmnCmpnLmtAmt --잔여보상한도금액 , A.CUST_BRDN_AMT AS custBrdnAmt --고객부담금 , A.REAL_CMPN_AMT AS realCmpnAmt --실보상금액 , A.OVER_AMT AS overAmt --초과금 , A.USIM_AMT AS usimAmt --유심비용 , FN_GET_USRNM(A.REGST_ID) AS rvisnId , TO_CHAR(A.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS regstDttm FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_MST_IF A WHERE A.IF_CD IN ('A', 'P') AND A.INSR_MNGM_NO = #{insrMngmNo} ORDER BY A.ACDNT_DT
